name: datadive-adapter
description: MCP server for DataDive Amazon analytics tools.
long_description: DataDive Adapter exposes DataDive Amazon analytics as MCP tools for niche research, keyword intelligence, competitor analysis, rank tracking, Niche Dive jobs, and AI copywriting workflows.

tools.name: datadive_get_keywords
tools.description: Get keyword data for a niche.

tools.name: datadive_get_competitors
tools.description: Get competitor ASINs and niche statistics.

tools.name: datadive_get_ranking_juices
tools.description: Get ranking factor analysis for a niche.

tools.name: datadive_get_keyword_roots
tools.description: Get keyword root groupings for a niche.

tools.name: datadive_get_rank_radar
tools.description: Get keyword ranking data for a Rank Radar tracker.

tools.name: datadive_get_dive_status
tools.description: Check the status of a Niche Dive research job.

tools.name: datadive_create_dive
tools.description: Create a new Niche Dive research job.

tools.name: datadive_create_rank_radar
tools.description: Create a Rank Radar keyword tracker.

tools.name: datadive_ai_copywriter
tools.description: Generate optimized listing copy for a niche.

tools.name: datadive_delete_niche
tools.description: Delete a niche and associated research data.

tools.name: datadive_delete_rank_radar
tools.description: Delete a Rank Radar keyword tracker.
